nasb.text: Also the utensils which are given to you for the service of the house of your God, deliver in full before the God of Jerusalem.

esv.text: The vessels that have been given you for the service of the house of your God, you shall deliver before the God of Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 至於交給你為你　神殿中事奉用的器皿，你要放在耶路撒冷的　神面前。

ccb.text: 那些交托给你、用来在你上帝的殿里敬拜的器皿，你要带到耶路撒冷的上帝面前。
